zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree於大約1521年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾奧爾崔時，他的父親Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree19歲，母親Margaret Hamilton22歲。他和Agnes Cunningham of Caprington至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1591年11月21日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾奧爾崔享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree于大约1521年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾奧爾崔时，他的父亲Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree19岁，母亲Margaret Hamilton22岁。他和Agnes Cunningham of Caprington至少有8个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1591年11月21日在苏格兰艾斯爾奧爾崔享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree was born about 1521, in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Hamilton, was 22. He had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. He died on 21 November 1591, in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree est né environ 1521, à Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hamilton, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. Il est décédé le 21 novembre 1591, à Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree um 1521 in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Hamilton 22. Er hatte mit Agnes Cunningham of Caprington mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. November 1591 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree è nato il circa 1521 nel Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hamilton, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. Morì il 21 novembre 1591, nel Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltreeが約1521年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアオチルトレで生まれた時，父Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltreeは19歳，母Margaret Hamiltonは22歳であった。彼はAgnes Cunningham of Capringtonとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1591年11月21日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアオチルトレで71歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree(이)가 대략 1521년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 오치트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hamilton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes Cunningham of Caprington(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 11월 21일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 오치트리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hamilton, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. Ele faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1591, em Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree родился около 1521 г. в местности очилтри, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hamilton, 22. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. Он умер 21 ноября 1591 г. в местности очилтри, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree nació aproximadamente 1521, en Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Hamilton, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes Cunningham of Caprington. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1591, en Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Ayrshire, Scotland.
